parts.prompt: Write the half-reaction for the oxidation that occurs at the anode.

scoring_points.description: For the correct equation (state symbols not required): Point 01 Al(s) → Al3+ (aq) + 3 e −

required_elements: For the correct equation (state symbols not required): Point 01 Al(s) → Al3+ (aq) + 3 e −

parts.prompt: Write the balanced net ionic equation for the overall reaction that occurs in the galvanic cell.

scoring_points.description: For the correct balanced net ionic equation (state symbols not required): Point 02 2 Al(s) + 3 Zn2+ (aq) → 2 Al3+ (aq) + 3 Zn(s)

required_elements: For the correct balanced net ionic equation (state symbols not required): Point 02 2 Al(s) + 3 Zn2+ (aq) → 2 Al3+ (aq) + 3 Zn(s)

parts.prompt:

calculation.

Mn2+(aq)+ 2 e - " Mn(s) -1.19
Al3+(aq)+ 3 e - " Al(s) -1.66
Be2+(aq)+ 2 e - " Be(s) -1.85

scoring_points.description: For the correct answer and a valid justification that correctly compares the masses of Al Point 03

required_elements: For the correct answer and a valid justification that correctly compares the masses of Al Point 03
